test.note: Tests pass. Two unrelated swell-core config tests (test_higher_layer_overrides_lower_layer, test_missing_layers_handled_gracefully) have test isolation issues with SWELL_TIMEOUT env var pollution, but these are pre-existing M7 issues, not M9 blocking.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document when #[allow(...)] attributes are appropriate vs when to refactor code to avoid suppressions. Currently no guidance exists on this convention.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: obs-langfuse-integration uses multiple #[allow(dead_code)] and #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)] suppressions without documented rationale. Multiple workers have flagged this as unclear.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify the skill naming: 'rust-worker' vs 'rust'. The features.json consistently specifies 'rust-worker' but only 'rust' exists in .factory/skills/. Either standardize on 'rust' or ensure 'rust-worker' exists as an alias.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple features (obs-turn-summary-event, obs-diff-review, obs-task-interruption, obs-trust-resolution) all specify skillName 'rust-worker' which doesn't exist. Workers proceed without the intended skill guidance.

rejectedObservations.observation: TurnSummaryEvent not wired into orchestrator turn loop
rejectedObservations.reason: The reviewer suggested this might be intentional - defining the event type first (this step) with integration as a separate future step. This is a non-blocking observation about scope, not a bug.

rejectedObservations.observation: Verification misleading about test coverage for obs-turn-summary-event
rejectedObservations.reason: While the observation is accurate (tests referenced are for pre-existing TurnSummary in orchestrator, not new TurnSummaryEvent in swell-core), the feature implementation itself is correct and tests are properly added in events.rs. The misleading verification is a documentation/handoff issue, not a code issue.

notes: Re-run after fix for obs-doom-loop-reset (commit 089a718). The fix correctly delegates clear_loop_context() to clear() instead of duplicating the method body. All M9-observability-ux assertions now pass.
